theory.canonical_statement: ID3664 records Quantum Holonomy Stress-Energy Tensor as a source-extracted canonical equation.
theory.technical_interpretation: The entry preserves the equation exactly as extracted from `D:\00_Engine\CSV\emergent_curvature_theory.tex` for registry alignment and later derivation.

latex_blocks:
egin{align}  rac{\partial g_{\mu
u}}{\partial t} &=  rac{16\pi G}{c^4}\int_{-\infty}^t T_{\mu
u}(	au)e^{-(t-	au)/	au_{	ext{dec}}} d	au + \mathcal{R}_{\mu
u}^{	ext{quantum}} \  rac{\partialho}{\partial t} &= - rac{i}{\hbar}[H,ho] + \mathcal{L}_{	ext{decoherence}}[ho] + \mathcal{B}_{	ext{gravity}}[ho,g] \  rac{d\mathcal{H}}{dt} &= -2\oint_{\partial V} (\mathbf{J}_{	ext{helicity}} + \mathbf{J}_{	ext{grav}}) \cdot \hat{\mathbf{n}} \, dS \end{align}

blocks.wolfram_input: HoldForm[TZPIDCanonicalLatex["ID3664", 1, "\\begin{align} \\frac{\\partial g_{\\mu\\nu}}{\\partial t} &= \\frac{16\\pi G}{c^4}\\int_{-\\infty}^t T_{\\mu\\nu}(\\tau)e^{-(t-\\tau)/\\tau_{\\text{dec}}} d\\tau + \\mathcal{R}_{\\mu\\nu}^{\\text{quantum}} \\\\ \\frac{\\partial\\rho}{\\partial t} &= -\\frac{i}{\\hbar}[H,\\rho] + \\mathcal{L}_{\\text{decoherence}}[\\rho] + \\mathcal{B}_{\\text{gravity}}[\\rho,g] \\\\ \\frac{d\\mathcal{H}}{dt} &= -2\\oint_{\\partial V} (\\mathbf{J}_{\\text{helicity}} + \\mathbf{J}_{\\text{grav}}) \\cdot \\hat{\\mathbf{n}} \\, dS \\end{align}"]]
